about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Orion Chen, an engineer who cares about more than technology.
about.headline: An engineer who cares about more than technology.
about.intro1: I'm Orion Chen. Code taught me how to break problems apart; writing and film keep bringing me back to the people inside those problems.
about.intro2Suffix: : the story is not over, and people are still on the field.

lenses.label: Code
lenses.title: Make things that run
lenses.body: Break vague problems apart, press them into systems, and make judgment reusable.

lenses.label: Writing
lenses.title: Write about the people technology cannot explain
lenses.body: AI, work, family, and the shifts of an era eventually land on specific human lives.

lenses.label: Film
lenses.title: Put the problem back on site
lenses.body: The documentary work is still beginning. I want to film people outside the center of the narrative who are still living seriously.
